[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111001000 4
1 110110001 5
2 110101100 5
3 100011011 5
4 101110011 6
5 011000011 4
6 101001011 5
7 111001000 4

67 76 111000011 5
70 07 101001011 5 match 6
